slides.headline: The 3 words to say when the phone goes.
"[Business], how can I help?"
slides.body: Name first. It tells the caller they rang the right place — and you're a business, not a bloke.

slides.headline: Get the job, then the name.
slides.body: "What's the issue?" before "who's calling?". People open up about the problem faster than themselves.

slides.headline: Book before you hang up.
slides.body: Never "I'll call you back". Offer two slots: "Thursday morning or Friday afternoon?" One always sticks.

slides.headline: The call you don't convert is the call your competitor does.
Can't answer every call yourself?
slides.body: That's what we fix. Free audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this for the next time the phone rings
